2026-06-02TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Montréal Port AuthorityAppointment of Claudine Marineau of Westmount, Quebec, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, effective June 21, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Montréal Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Claudine Marineau of Westmount, Quebec, to be a director of the Montréal Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, effective June 21, 2026.
